requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Angola Local Fire and Building Authority Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——安哥拉当地消防和建筑主管机关要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——安哥拉當地消防和建築主管機關要求

summary.en: Angola does not have a confirmed published national fire-safety installation code specifically for stationary battery energy storage systems (BESS). Fire and building safety for BESS installations in Angola is governed by local fire authority and municipal building authority review, which operate under Angola's general fire-safety and building regulations. For EPC and development-finance-institution (DFI)-funded projects (such as MCA-financed solar-plus-storage plants), fire-safety design requirements for BESS installations are typically defined in the EPC contract, project specifications, and lender environmental and social standards, which reference international standards including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based energy storage systems) and IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications). NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) may also be referenced in EPC or lender specifications, particularly where US-influenced project standards are used. All fire-safety design documentation submitted to Angola authorities must be in Portuguese. A confirmed standalone mandatory Angola fire-safety standard specifically for BESS had not been identified from official public sources as of the dataset date; verification directly with local fire authorities and the project owner is essential before design is finalised.
summary.zh: 安哥拉尚无经确认的专门针对固定式储能电池系统（BESS）的国家消防安全安装规范。安哥拉BESS装置的消防和建筑安全由当地消防主管机关和市政建筑主管机关依据安哥拉通用消防安全和建筑法规进行审查。对于EPC和开发性金融机构（DFI）资助的项目（如MCA资助的太阳能+储能发电厂），BESS装置的消防安全设计要求通常在EPC合同、项目规格及贷方环境和社会标准中规定，引用国际标准包括IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）和IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）也可能在EPC或贷方规格中被引用，特别是采用美国影响项目标准的项目。提交给安哥拉主管机关的所有消防安全设计文件须以葡萄牙语编制。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方公开来源确认安哥拉存在专门针对BESS的独立强制性消防安全标准；在设计最终确定前，须直接向当地消防主管机关和项目业主核实。
summary.zht: 安哥拉尚無經確認的專門針對固定式儲能電池系統（BESS）的國家消防安全安裝規範。安哥拉BESS裝置的消防和建築安全由當地消防主管機關和市政建築主管機關依據安哥拉通用消防安全和建築法規進行審查。對於EPC和開發性金融機構（DFI）資助的項目（如MCA資助的太陽能+儲能發電廠），BESS裝置的消防安全設計要求通常在EPC合同、項目規格及貸方環境和社會標準中規定，引用國際標準包括IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）和IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）也可能在EPC或貸方規格中被引用，特別是採用美國影響項目標準的項目。提交給安哥拉主管機關的所有消防安全設計文件須以葡萄牙語編制。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方公開來源確認安哥拉存在專門針對BESS的獨立強制性消防安全標準；在設計最終確定前，須直接向當地消防主管機關和項目業主核實。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected EPC and DFI lender project-specification reference for BESS installations in Angola)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (expected EPC and DFI lender project-specification reference)

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (may be referenced in EPC or lender specifications for MCA/DFI-funded projects — formal Angola authority adoption unconfirmed as of dataset date)
Angola local fire authority and municipal building authority — mandatory approval for BESS installation commissioning; no confirmed standalone national BESS fire-safety standard as of dataset date

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Angola authorities or development finance institution lenders as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2, IEC 62619, or NFPA 855-based fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC-based design documentation for EPC and lender project review in Angola.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被安哥拉主管机关或开发性金融机构贷方认可为等同于IEC 62933-5-2、IEC 62619或基于NFPA 855的消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在安哥拉EPC和贷方项目审查中补充基于IEC的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被安哥拉主管機關或開發性金融機構貸方認可為等同於IEC 62933-5-2、IEC 62619或基於NFPA 855的消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在安哥拉EPC和貸方項目審查中補充基於IEC的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Angola does not have a confirmed standalone national BESS fire-safety installation code as of the dataset date; however, local fire authority approval is a mandatory installation gate for all commercial and industrial projects, and EPC and DFI lender project specifications for Angola BESS projects require IEC 62933-5-2 and IEC 62619 fire-safety evidence. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy EPC contractor, lender, or local authority requirements. Project teams should: (a) confirm directly with local Angola fire authority the applicable fire-safety standards and approval process for stationary BESS installations before design is finalised; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 and the project specification — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, fire suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) check whether the EPC or lender specification references NFPA 855 and prepare supplementary documentation accordingly; (d) engage a local Angola fire-safety engineer or EPC subcontractor experienced with DFI-funded projects for design review and authority submission; (e) prepare all Angola authority submissions in Portuguese.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，安哥拉尚无经确认的独立国家BESS消防安全安装规范；但当地消防主管机关审批是所有商业及工业项目的强制安装门槛，且安哥拉BESS项目的EPC和DFI贷方规格要求IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619消防安全证据。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足EPC承包商、贷方或当地主管机关要求。项目团队应：（a）在设计最终确定前直接向安哥拉当地消防主管机关确认适用于固定式BESS装置的消防安全标准和审批程序；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2和项目规格要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、消防抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）检查EPC或贷方规格是否引用NFPA 855，并相应准备补充文件；（d）聘请熟悉DFI资助项目的安哥拉当地消防安全工程师或EPC分包商进行设计审查和主管机关提交；（e）所有安哥拉主管机关提交文件以葡萄牙语编制。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，安哥拉尚無經確認的獨立國家BESS消防安全安裝規範；但當地消防主管機關審批是所有商業及工業項目的強制安裝門檻，且安哥拉BESS項目的EPC和DFI貸方規格要求IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619消防安全證據。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足EPC承包商、貸方或當地主管機關要求。項目團隊應：（a）在設計最終確定前直接向安哥拉當地消防主管機關確認適用於固定式BESS裝置的消防安全標準和審批程序；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2和項目規格要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、消防抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）檢查EPC或貸方規格是否引用NFPA 855，並相應準備補充文件；（d）聘請熟悉DFI資助項目的安哥拉當地消防安全工程師或EPC分包商進行設計審查和主管機關提交；（e）所有安哥拉主管機關提交文件以葡萄牙語編制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local fire authority approval is required for BESS commissioning in Angola; no confirmed standalone national BESS fire-safety code as of dataset date — verify with local fire authority and project owner before design is finalised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) — IEC 62933-5-2 (primary EPC/lender reference standard for Angola BESS fire-safety; Angola local fire authority website not confirmed accessible from official public sources as of dataset date)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory national BESS fire-safety installation code as of the dataset date; however, local fire authority approval is a mandatory gate for BESS commissioning, and EPC and DFI lender specifications for Angola projects require IEC 62933-5-2 and IEC 62619 fire-safety evidence. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation alone does not satisfy EPC contractor or lender requirements. Engage local fire authorities and a DFI-experienced fire-safety engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm applicable standards, approval process, and documentation requirements. All submissions must be in Portuguese.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，安哥拉尚无经确认的独立强制性国家BESS消防安全安装规范；但当地消防主管机关审批是BESS投入使用的强制门槛，且安哥拉项目的EPC和DFI贷方规格要求IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619消防安全证据。仅凭中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足EPC承包商或贷方要求。应在项目最早阶段与当地消防主管机关及具有DFI项目经验的消防安全工程师接触，确认适用标准、审批程序和文件要求。所有提交文件须以葡萄牙语编制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，安哥拉尚無經確認的獨立強制性國家BESS消防安全安裝規範；但當地消防主管機關審批是BESS投入使用的強制門檻，且安哥拉項目的EPC和DFI貸方規格要求IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62619消防安全證據。僅憑中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足EPC承包商或貸方要求。應在項目最早階段與當地消防主管機關及具有DFI項目經驗的消防安全工程師接觸，確認適用標準、審批程序和文件要求。所有提交文件須以葡萄牙語編制。
